2 Samuel 13

Amnon and Tamar

NoteShimeah is a variant of Shammah, Shimea, and Shimei; see 1 Samuel 16:9, 2 Samuel 21:21, and 1 Chronicles 2:13.
NoteOr a robe with long sleeves; see also Genesis 37:3.
NoteDSS and LXX include But he would not punish his son Amnon, because he loved him, since he was his firstborn.

Absalom’s Revenge on Amnon

NoteLXX and Vulgate include And Absalom prepared a feast fit for a king.

Absalom Flees to Geshur

NoteOr behind him NoteLXX; Hebrew does not include And the watchman....
NoteMT; DSS and LXX And the spirit of the king NoteOr ceased to go out after Absalom
